arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou now faces a major decision on Micky van de Ven after ruling him out of Tottenham’s trip to Anfield. Postecoglou says Tottenham won’t...

arts.ttl: 'He's not': Paul Merson claims 'special' striker cannot join Tottenham or Man Utd but could sign for Arsenal
arts.sum: "He can only go to Arsenal in the whole world." 👀

arts.ttl: Postecoglou Convinced Another Player to Join Tottenham on Phone After Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur boss Ange Postecoglou’s phone call convinced starlet Mason Melia to snub interest from Premier League clubs and join Spurs.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Arsenal tussle to sign Barcelona player possible in summer
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Arsenal looked at Barcelona’s Ferran Torres in the winter market, according to a report from Spain. On December 28th, Sport reported Arsenal showed willingness to make an offer for the 24-year-old. However, there wasn’t anything concrete to suggest the Gunners submitting a bid for him. Thursday’s edition of Marca mentions both Tottenham The post Tottenham and Arsenal tussle to sign Barcelona player possible in summer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to overturn a one-goal first leg deficit when they host Tottenham in the Carabao Cup semi-finals on Thursday evening. Liverpool have just the one absentee on Thursday evening but it's a sizeable one, with Trent Alexander-Arnold missing for Arne Slot having sustained an injury to his leg in the weekend win over Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'learn Frenkie de Jong asking price' as Arne Slot hits transfer stumbling block
arts.sum: Liverpool-linked midfielder Frenkie de Jong could be allowed to leave Barcelona for as little as £29.2m during the summer window, according to a report.

arts.ttl: ‘Interesting one’: Alasdair Gold shares what ‘people from Germany’ are now telling him about Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is the newest arrival at Tottenham after joining Spurs on transfer deadline day. Tel changed his plans late in the day to join...

arts.ttl: Five of Liverpool’s best Anfield comebacks
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Tottenham Hotspur to Merseyside this evening in the Carabao Cup semi-finals. Trailing 1-0 from the first leg, the Reds will require another comeback on home soil to progress to the decider. Liverpool are no strangers to comebacks at Anfield, with the famous ground the scene for some stunning turnarounds. Ahead of their semi-final […] The post Five of Liverpool’s best Anfield comebacks first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'I am reliably informed' - Arne Slot has clear Anfield hope for Liverpool vs Tottenham decider
arts.sum: Liverpool have released head coach Arne Slot's programme notes for tonight's Carabao Cup semi-final second leg against Tottenham Hotspur at Anfield

arts.ttl: Liverpool told which one of their three contract rebels would 'not be a huge loss'
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold are all out of contract in the summer, with Liverpool at risk of losing all three of their stars for nothing
